mnemonics.title: SDI Framework
mnemonics.content: SDI = Sequential, Direct, Indexed. The three fundamental file access methods in OS

mnemonics.title: ORC Operations
mnemonics.content: ORC = Open → Read/Write → Close. Essential steps for file access operations

mnemonics.title: Seek Patterns
mnemonics.content: Sequential (Tape), Direct (CD), Indexed (Book Index). Visualize storage media to remember access patterns

acronyms.usage: Used for tape drives and linear data access
Enables random access using physical addresses
Combines sequential and direct access using indexes

visualTips.visualization: Imagine a VHS tape - must fast-forward through all previous content to reach desired point
Picture a chessboard - jump directly to any square (block) using (row, column) coordinates
Visualize a textbook index - look up keyword once to find all related page numbers
Think of a DVD player's timecode display showing exact current position

analogies.analogy: Like reading a novel page-by-page - you can't read chapter 5 without going through chapters 1-4 first
Similar to GPS navigation - input an address and go directly to the location without following a fixed route
Like a warehouse inventory system - use a catalog to find exactly which shelf contains your item
Compare to pizza delivery - sequential is making each pizza in order, direct is having multiple delivery drivers
